title: Origins: Primeval Creeper
description: You are a Primeval Creeper, the first of your kind to have mastered the use of explosions to catch your prey offguard! (For Fabric)
body:
# Primeval Creeper 
_"You are a Primeval Creeper, the first of your kind to have mastered the use of explosions to catch your prey offguard!"_

`Made for Fabric, Minecraft version 1.20.2, Origins version 1.12.10) impact: 1, Icon: Gunpowder`

### "Remote Explosives" (Primary Active Ability, Default Keybind = G):
_"Drop items covered with explosive slime and detonate them at will!"_
- [+] Drop items that you can detonate later by pressing [Primary Active, Default Keybind = G]
- [+] You detonate the items by looking in their direction and pressing [Secondary Active].
- [+] You can also detonate entities that have picked up items dropped by this power in their inventory with [Secondary Active]
- - [=] Doing this destroys the item in their inventory.
- [-] Your Explosions are small but plentiful, and can't break stone!

### "Explosive Diet" (Consume Gunpowder for Effect):
- [+] By eating Gunpowder, you become immune to explosions for 15 seconds!
- [+] This effect stacks (For example, Eat 4 to have the effect for 60 seconds!)

### "Burning Weakness" (Negative Passive):
- [-] Because of your nature, if you are put on fire it will not extinguish on it's own.

### "Bad Archer" (Negative Passive):
- [-] You cannot use the full potential of Bows and Crossbows and deal 1 heart less damage with them.

_Origin by Frucs, made for The Dead Origins Jam!_
